chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3104 of 2024 CP D 3105 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.13841/2024 2. For hearing of main case 18.04.2025 Mr. Tanzeel Farooqui advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahab Imam, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mohabat Hussain Awan, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Under instructions learned counsel for the respondent states that the impugned reassessment is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view of such material representation learned counsel for the petitioner states that petitions appear to have served their purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
